svg.title: PicoRV32 32-bit Address Space Memory Map
svg.desc: Vertical memory map diagram for PicoRV32 showing address regions: FW BRAM, CIM CSR, UART TX, Result BRAM, and unmapped regions in between.
svg.text: Word-addressed, 4 GB total; not drawn to scale
Bus error on access (compressed in diagram)
(R/W BRAM) read/write block RAM | (R/W MMIO) read/write memory-mapped reg. | (W-only) write-only register
